en: Then Pharisees and scribes came to Jesus from Jerusalem and said,
zh: 有法利賽人和經學家從耶路撒冷前來，問耶穌：

en: "Why do your disciples break the tradition of the elders? For they do not wash their hands when they eat."
zh: “你的門徒為甚麼違背古人的傳統，在飯前不洗手呢？”

en: He answered them, "And why do you break the commandment of God for the sake of your tradition?
zh: 耶穌回答：“你們又為甚麼因你們的傳統，違背 神的誡命呢？

en: For God commanded, 'Honor your father and your mother,' and, 'Whoever reviles father or mother must surely die.'
zh: 神說：‘當孝敬父母’，又說：‘咒罵父母的必被處死’。

en: But you say, 'If anyone tells his father or his mother, What you would have gained from me is given to God,
zh: 你們卻說：‘人若對父母說：“我應該給你們的，已經作了獻給 神的禮物”，

en: he need not honor his father.' So for the sake of your tradition you have made void the word of God.
zh: 他就可以不孝敬父母了。’你們因為你們的傳統，就廢棄了 神的話。

en: You hypocrites! Well did Isaiah prophesy of you, when he said:
zh: 偽君子啊，以賽亞指著你們說的預言說得好：

en: "'This people honors me with their lips, but their heart is far from me;
zh: ‘這人民用嘴唇尊敬我，心卻遠離我；

en: in vain do they worship me, teaching as doctrines the commandments of men.'"
zh: 他們把人的規條當作道理去教導人， 所以拜我也是徒然。’”

en: And he called the people to him and said to them, "Hear and understand:
zh: 耶穌叫群眾前來，對他們說：“你們要聽，也要明白。

en: it is not what goes into the mouth that defiles a person, but what comes out of the mouth; this defiles a person."
zh: 進到口裡的不能使人污穢，只有從口裡出來的，才能使人污穢。”

en: Then the disciples came and said to him, "Do you know that the Pharisees were offended when they heard this saying?"
zh: 門徒前來告訴他：“法利賽人聽了這話很生氣，你知道嗎？”

en: He answered, "Every plant that my heavenly Father has not planted will be rooted up.
zh: 耶穌說：“所有不是我天父栽種的植物，都要連根拔起來。

en: Let them alone; they are blind guides. And if the blind lead the blind, both will fall into a pit."
zh: 由得他們吧！他們是瞎眼的，卻作了嚮導；如果瞎子領瞎子，二人都會跌進坑裡。”

en: But Peter said to him, "Explain the parable to us."
zh: 彼得說：“請你給我們解釋這個比喻吧。”

en: And he said, "Are you also still without understanding?
zh: 耶穌說：“你們還是不明白嗎？

en: Do you not see that whatever goes into the mouth passes into the stomach and is expelled?
zh: 難道不知道一切進到口裡的，是進到肚腹，然後排泄到外面 去嗎？

en: But what comes out of the mouth proceeds from the heart, and this defiles a person.
zh: 但從口裡出來的，是發自內心，才會使人污穢。

en: For out of the heart come evil thoughts, murder, adultery, sexual immorality, theft, false witness, slander.
zh: 因為從心裡出來的，有惡念、兇殺、姦淫、淫亂、偷盜、假見證和毀謗。

en: These are what defile a person. But to eat with unwashed hands does not defile anyone."
zh: 這些才會使人污穢，不洗手吃飯卻不會這樣。”

en: And Jesus went away from there and withdrew to the district of Tyre and Sidon.
zh: 耶穌離開那裡，退到推羅、西頓境內。

en: And behold, a Canaanite woman from that region came out and was crying, "Have mercy on me, O Lord, Son of David; my daughter is severely oppressed by a demon."
zh: 有一個迦南的婦人從那地區出來，喊著說：“主啊，大衛的子孫，可憐我吧！我的女兒被鬼附得很苦。”

en: But he did not answer her a word. And his disciples came and begged him, saying, "Send her away, for she is crying out after us."
zh: 耶穌一句話也不回答她。門徒上前求他說：“請叫她走吧，她一直跟在我們後面喊叫。”

en: He answered, "I was sent only to the lost sheep of the house of Israel."
zh: 耶穌回答：“我被差遣，只是到以色列家的迷羊那裡去。”

en: But she came and knelt before him, saying, "Lord, help me."
zh: 她來跪在耶穌面前說：“主啊，求你幫助我！”

en: And he answered, "It is not right to take the children's bread and throw it to the dogs."
zh: 耶穌回答：“拿兒女的餅丟給小狗吃是不好的。”

en: She said, "Yes, Lord, yet even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall from their masters' table."
zh: 她說：“主啊，是的，不過小狗也吃主人桌子上掉下來的碎渣。”

en: Then Jesus answered her, "O woman, great is your faith! Be it done for you as you desire." And her daughter was healed instantly.
zh: 於是耶穌對她說：“婦人，你的信心真大，照你所想的給你成就吧！”從那時起，她的女兒就好了。

en: Jesus went on from there and walked beside the Sea of Galilee. And he went up on the mountain and sat down there.
zh: 耶穌離開那裡，來到加利利海邊，就上山坐下。

en: And great crowds came to him, bringing with them the lame, the blind, the crippled, the mute, and many others, and they put them at his feet, and he healed them,
zh: 有許多人來到他那裡，把瘸腿的、瞎眼的、殘廢的、啞的和許多別的病人，都帶到耶穌跟前，他就醫好他們。

en: so that the crowd wondered, when they saw the mute speaking, the crippled healthy, the lame walking, and the blind seeing. And they glorified the God of Israel.
zh: 群眾看見啞巴說話，殘廢的復原，瘸腿的行走，瞎眼的看見，就十分驚奇，於是頌讚以色列的 神。

en: Then Jesus called his disciples to him and said, "I have compassion on the crowd because they have been with me now three days and have nothing to eat. And I am unwilling to send them away hungry, lest they faint on the way."
zh: 耶穌叫門徒前來，說：“我憐憫這一群人，因為他們跟我在一起已經有三天，也沒有甚麼吃的；我不想叫他們餓著肚子回去，恐怕他們在路上暈倒。”

en: And the disciples said to him, "Where are we to get enough bread in such a desolate place to feed so great a crowd?"
zh: 門徒對他說：“我們在這曠野地方，哪裡有足夠的食物給這許多的人吃飽呢？”

en: And Jesus said to them, "How many loaves do you have?" They said, "Seven, and a few small fish."
zh: 耶穌問他們：“你們有多少餅？”他們說：“七個餅和幾條小魚。”

en: And directing the crowd to sit down on the ground,
zh: 他就吩咐群眾坐在地上，

en: he took the seven loaves and the fish, and having given thanks he broke them and gave them to the disciples, and the disciples gave them to the crowds.
zh: 拿起那七個餅和那些魚，祝謝了，擘開遞給門徒，門徒又分給眾人。

en: And they all ate and were satisfied. And they took up seven baskets full of the broken pieces left over.
zh: 大家都吃了，並且吃飽了。他們把剩下的零碎拾起來，裝滿了七個大籃子。

en: Those who ate were four thousand men, besides women and children.
zh: 吃的人，除了婦女和孩子，共有四千。

en: And after sending away the crowds, he got into the boat and went to the region of Magadan.
zh: 耶穌解散了群眾，就上了船，來到馬加丹地區。
